Package index

Datasets

Included datasets.

cpi_u_monthly_nsa cpi_u_monthly_sa cpi_u_quarterly_nsa cpi_u_quarterly_sa cpi_u_annual
Consumer Price Index for Urban Consumers (CPI-U) data
c_cpi_u_monthly_nsa c_cpi_u_quarterly_nsa c_cpi_u_annual
Chained Consumer Price Index for Urban Consumers (C-CPI-U) data
c_cpi_u_extended_monthly_nsa c_cpi_u_extended_monthly_sa c_cpi_u_extended_quarterly_nsa c_cpi_u_extended_quarterly_sa c_cpi_u_extended_annual
Extended Chained Consumer Price Index for Urban Consumers (C-CPI-U)
cpi_u_rs_monthly_nsa cpi_u_rs_annual
Consumer Price Index for Urban Consumers Research Series (CPI-U-RS) data
cpi_u_x1_monthly_nsa cpi_u_x1_annual
Experimental Consumer Price Index for Urban Consumers X1 (CPI-U-X1) data
pce_monthly_sa pce_quarterly_sa pce_annual
Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) price index
us_minimum_wage_monthly us_minimum_wage_annual
Example nominal US federal minimum wage data

Documentation

Tibbles documenting the data.

available_price_indexes
Price indexes available in the realtalk package

Functions

Package functions.

get_price_index()
Get price index series as a data frame

On this page

Site built with pkgdown and epitemplate.
